title: Q Trailers Thread was Q trailer on new Nico Nico
display_title: Q Trailers Thread was Q trailer on new Nico Nico
wikitext:
[]: Q Trailers Thread (was: Q trailer on new Nico Nico) Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 11, 2012 9:59 am http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-1810.html According to Minna No Eva Fan, Niconico is getting a new version (some kind of upgrade) and there's an invitation with 0 (as the countdown or the upgrade name?) written, but the shadow of the 0 looks like the letter "Q". Perhaps a trailer or some kind of news on 10/17? I'd be okay with this! It's also speculated that maybe the invitation update for Nico is a parody with using "Q". Guess we'll see next week!

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Oct 11, 2012 11:41 am I looked through the link, but I still couldn't figure out what a Niconico is.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 11, 2012 11:44 am It's sort of like the Youtube of Japan but people can leave comments that scroll ON the videos: http://www.niconico.com/ , http://www.nicovideo.jp/

[]: Post by AR-99 » Thu Oct 11, 2012 12:20 pm So that's what that was. I was wondering what the hell is going on with the videos.

[]: Post by cd603 » Thu Oct 11, 2012 5:17 pm If they're posting a new trailer it makes sense for it to be on the 17th, since that would be a month away for the release.

[]: Post by chaosakita » Thu Oct 11, 2012 11:09 pm I would be happy with almost anything at this point.

[]: Post by Chrad » Fri Oct 12, 2012 6:58 am I hope they don't release any more trailers, and that any marketing from here on out is totally vague and bizarre.

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Oct 12, 2012 10:05 am Chrad wrote: I hope they don't release any more trailers, and that any marketing from here on out is totally vague and bizarre.

[]: Post by Blue Monday » Fri Oct 12, 2012 7:26 pm Throw your "hype" in the bin. They can do whatever they want as long as the movie is out on the 17th next month.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Oct 12, 2012 8:44 pm Blue Monday wrote: Throw your "hype" in the bin.

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Oct 12, 2012 11:17 pm Blue Monday wrote: Throw your "hype" in the bin. They can do whatever they want as long as the movie is out on the 17th next month.

[]: Post by Knuckles » Sat Oct 13, 2012 12:18 am My hype for this movie is almost all but gone at this point.

[]: Post by qu4d » Sat Oct 13, 2012 2:12 am Knuckles wrote: My hype for this movie almost all but gone at this point.

[]: Post by Knuckles » Sat Oct 13, 2012 5:10 am qu4d wrote: And is this a good or a bad thing? ;) No hype is better IMHO, the lesser excited you are, the bigger the impact of the movie can be.

[]: Post by hui43210 » Sat Oct 13, 2012 8:55 am Just to know the movie is coming out in a month is all the hype I need.

[]: Post by tomfrom994 » Sat Oct 13, 2012 11:03 am One part of me likes the advertising so far. After it was confirmed that the piano thing would elicit a "Oh, I get it" response when people actually see the movie, it made me really start to appreciate it. It makes me think of how the last poster for 2.0 came to mind when you saw the final scene in 2.0. I thought that that was kind of cool. But then, the other part of me doesn't really see why it's necessary to elicit that sort of response from the viewer, as the way 2.0 did it didn't really add much more to the film than what was already there. Granted, that scene is sort of iconic in my mind, but I have a hard time believing the poster did anything to make it feel iconic. But THEN, the OTHER part of me feels like it's a way for Anno to keep audiences from knowing what happens in the film. Thus, we're left with the "piano association," as well as our minds speculating tons of different scenarios, thus widening our expectations, but leaving them non-specific. In other words, I believe that we're getting something from this trailer. It's something that's from the film, and it's something that isn't. It's like seeing a scribbly sketch from the last scene of the film that won't make sense until we see it. And we dismiss it, simply because we don't get it. Thus, Anno has worked his way into the inner workings of your mind to leave you guessing around what may be the backbone of the film, and leaving us all to be proven wrong when we actually see it. Therefore, we can say that EVANGELION：3.0 is the most advanced film that human kind has made thus far, as it is not only advanced in terms of the technology used to make it, but it is a film that has an accelerated knowledge of the human mind. If these trailers are any indicator, this film will travel deeper through the subconscious than any film ever made. It will then brainwash us into seeing EVANGELION：FINAL, which will wipe our minds clean of moral restraints to make us perfect candidates for Anno's growing army of libertine soldiers that will rule the world and use their power to allow Anno to begin the 120 Days of Sodom on the first of November in 2014. Or, I'm over analysing it. Either way, I think the piano trailer is pretty cool.

[]: Post by SEELE-01 » Sat Oct 13, 2012 5:40 pm ^ I'll stick with a zombie apocalypse, if you don't mind... I wonder, if it is indeed a trailer, if it'll be the "Fly me to the moon" format used in 1.0 and 2.0... I liked those a lot...

[]: Post by Warren Peace » Sat Oct 13, 2012 5:43 pm People already have a lot of fan fiction-y ideas about what the films are supposed to be (not that I'm not criticizing anyone for speculating, that's the nature of the game). It's fine as long as you don't take speculating too seriously (I.E., "Q MUST be X, Y, and Z or it will suck" ). I'm kind of glad that the lack of traditional advertising has kept some fuel off that fire -- we won't get pissed when our big ideas about half-second flashes in the trailer turn out to be wrong.

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Mon Oct 15, 2012 11:32 am Warren Peace wrote: People already have a lot of fan fiction-y ideas about what the films are supposed to be (not that I'm not criticizing anyone for speculating, that's the nature of the game). It's fine as long as you don't take speculating too seriously (I.E., "Q MUST be X, Y, and Z or it will suck" ).

[]: Post by Bagheera » Mon Oct 15, 2012 11:40 am hui43210 wrote: Just to know the movie is coming out in a month is all the hype I need.
